name: Armchair Quarterback Crunch
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Rasted pepitas or hulled pumpkin seeds (optional)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place popped popcorn, pretzels and pepitas in a large bowl.
2. Melt the margarine in a small pan.
3. Add Parmesan cheese and Mexican seasoning to the melted margarine.
4. Drizzle the mixture over the popcorn and toss lightly.
5. Makes about 3 1/2 quarts.
